Caption: Schematic representation of a model characterizing the shear behavior of a general viscoelastic medium.
Schematic representations of viscoelastic models characterizing the shear behavior of materials implemented in the SGFD simulation approach.

Normalized (a), (c) spatio–temporal shear wave velocity motion data and (b), (d) corresponding k–space spectra. The results are presented for the numerical SGFD tissue–mimicking homogeneous viscoelastic models.

Caption: Phase velocity dispersion curves. Results are presented for the numerical 2D SGFD tissue–mimicking homogeneous viscoelastic models along with analytical calculations.
Analytical phase velocity dispersion curves of materials used in heterogeneous numerical simulations with viscoelastic inclusions.
Normalized spatio–temporal shear wave velocity motion data and corresponding wavefields for selected values of time.

Time history plots of shear wave particle velocity profiles measured at three spatial locations, (a) before the inclusion, (b) at the center of the inclusion, and (c) after the inclusion. Results are shown for 2D SGFD numerical simulations for three different viscoelastic inclusion models.
